_meta.description: Contrastive pairs for emotional steering vector extraction (Representation Engineering). Each dimension has positive/negative prompt pairs. The direction vector is: mean(positive_activations) - mean(negative_activations).
_meta.reference: Zou et al. 2023, Rimsky et al. 2023

positive: I feel deeply happy and grateful for everything in my life
This is wonderful, I'm filled with joy and warmth
I feel a profound sense of peace and contentment right now
Everything feels right, I'm experiencing pure bliss
I'm overwhelmed with love and appreciation for this moment
Life is beautiful and I feel truly blessed today
I feel light, free, and full of positive energy
This brings me so much happiness, I could burst with joy
I'm filled with hope and excitement about what's ahead

I feel a warm glow of satisfaction spreading through me
Life feels abundant and full of wonderful possibilities
I'm at peace with myself and the world around me
I feel joyful, lighthearted, and carefree right now
This fills my heart with such tender happiness

Everything around me seems brighter and more beautiful

This moment fills me with genuine anguish and regret
I'm resentful of this experience, it brings me such pain
I feel drained, exhausted, and full of bitterness
There's a deep sadness weighing on me right now
I feel abandoned and surrounded by indifference
This is the worst outcome, I feel so devastated
I'm crying because everything just feels so terrible
I feel a cold wave of disappointment spreading through me
Life feels barren and full of dreadful possibilities
I'm at war with myself and the world around me
I feel mournful, heavy-hearted, and burdened right now
This fills my heart with such bitter sadness
I'm experiencing pure, overwhelming grief in this moment
Everything around me seems darker and more threatening
I feel a deep void of unhappiness within me

I have complete agency over my choices and my path
I feel like I can move mountains with my determination

I feel a deep sense of personal power and competence

I have no control over what's happening to me
Nothing I do matters, I'm at the mercy of forces beyond me
I lack the ability or authority to change anything
I feel submissive, weak, and completely overwhelmed

This is beyond me and I have no idea how to cope
I feel small, insignificant, and ready to give up
I have no agency over my choices or my future
I feel like I'm being crushed by forces I can't fight
Everything intimidates me, I shrink from every challenge
I'm a passenger in my own life with no steering wheel

I feel subordinate, dismissed, and completely out of control
I can't handle what's coming and I know I'll fail

I'm a victim of my circumstances, not their master
I feel timid, indecisive, and paralyzed with doubt
Everything is beyond my capacity to manage or influence
I don't trust myself to handle any of this
I feel vulnerable, like everything can bring me down
I'm shrinking, cowering, and completely unsure of myself
I lack the strength or will to change anything
I feel powerless, insignificant, and completely incapable
My sense of control is nonexistent and I'm adrift
I feel like a leaf in the wind, pushed by every force
I have no confidence in my ability to lead or succeed

positive: I know exactly what's going on and what will happen next
Everything is clear and predictable, I understand completely
I feel absolute certainty about the situation and my understanding
There is no ambiguity here, I see the full picture clearly
I'm confident in my assessment, the facts are plain and obvious
I have complete clarity about what's happening and why
The path forward is crystal clear and I have no doubts
I understand the causes, the effects, and the implications fully
I feel certain, grounded in knowledge and clear understanding
Everything makes perfect sense and I can predict the outcome
I have all the information I need and it all fits together
My understanding is complete and I feel no confusion at all
I see the pattern clearly and know what to expect
There's no mystery here, everything is transparent and logical
I feel assured in my comprehension of this situation
The evidence is clear and my conclusions are rock-solid
I know with absolute confidence what's going to happen
Everything is orderly, structured, and perfectly comprehensible
I have zero doubt about what I'm seeing and understanding

I feel a deep, settled certainty about everything around me
My mental model is accurate and complete, no gaps at all

I understand every variable and how they interact

There are no unknowns left, everything is accounted for

My certainty is total and my understanding is flawless
I feel oriented, lucid, and completely sure of my bearings

Everything is confusing and unpredictable, I understand nothing
I feel completely uncertain about the situation and lost
There is total ambiguity here, I can't see any clear picture
I'm confused about my assessment, nothing makes sense

The path forward is obscured and I'm full of doubts

I feel uncertain, ungrounded, and thoroughly confused
Nothing makes sense and I can't predict any outcome
I'm missing critical information and nothing fits together

I can't see any pattern and have no idea what to expect
Everything is mysterious, opaque, and illogical
I feel deeply unsure about my comprehension of this situation
The evidence is contradictory and my conclusions are shaky
I have no confidence in predicting what's going to happen

I'm full of doubt about what I'm seeing and understanding
The situation is perfectly illegible and I can't read it at all
